description_long: This object is a compact solar energy infrastructure unit, featuring a rectangular base with a prominent dark solar panel surface on top. The panel is bordered by a light-colored frame, likely made of metal or durable plastic, and is accompanied by several raised modules and colored components, possibly representing electrical housings or control units. The structure includes red and gray elements that may serve as protective covers or connection points for wiring. The overall design is low-profile, suggesting it is intended for ground or flat-surface installation in urban environments. The visible features indicate a fixed, non-adjustable orientation for the solar panel. The unit appears robust and weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor deployment in public or private spaces.
description: A compact, rectangular solar energy unit with a dark solar panel, light frame, and several raised modules and colored housings, designed for ground or flat-surface installation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main solar panel surface, bordered by a light frame and a prominent red module on the right.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the low-profile height, multiple raised modules, and the layered structure of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the solar panel, additional red and gray modules, and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the arrangement of raised modules and the continuous flat base.
attribute_panel_orientation: flat, parallel to the base, fixed orientation
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted, supported by a rectangular aluminum or plastic frame
attribute_array_configuration: single rectangular panel with several attached modules
